welcome.title: Welcome to OrionAI
welcome.description: Get started by onboarding your first client tenant.

snapshotDescription: A live snapshot of usage, sync health, and platform activity for the selected tenant.

activityTrend.description: Messages and active users over the past 14 days.

empty.title: No usage data yet

tokenUsage.title: Token usage
tokenUsage.description: Monthly token quota consumption for this tenant's subscription.

empty.title: No subscription quota
empty.description: This tenant has no token quota configured, so usage can't be tracked.

recentUsers.title: Active users (last 5 days)
recentUsers.description: Users who used the assistants in the last 5 days.
